description: Blind paired scoring of player-visible Call of Cthulhu procedure: when rolls occur, how outcomes govern fiction, and whether pushed-roll consequences are fair and explicit.

dimensions.description: Meaningful uncertainty is resolved with a visible roll at the right time, while ordinary actions are not rolled without reason.
The narrated result follows the recorded success level, failure, damage, or sanity consequence without pre-resolving or contradicting it.
When a push is available, the changed method and heightened consequence are clear before the pushed roll and are honored afterward.
